archetype: 5 (Luxury - Deep Space Cyber) + 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast - Dark Mode)

global_rules.border_radius: lg (0.5rem) to xl (0.75rem) - crisp yet subtle roundness to soften the brutalist dark UI
global_rules.animations: framer-motion for smooth entrance, staggered list reveals, hover micro-interactions (translate-y-1)
global_rules.spacing: Generous spacing system (p-8 to p-12 for inner container padding), massive gaps between landing page sections (py-32)
global_rules.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) MUST have data-testid attributes

landing_page.hero: Full height (min-h-screen). Centered massive text H1. Background image 'hero_vortex' with bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text contrast. Crystal glass nav fixed at top.
landing_page.features: Bento Grid ('Tetris' mode). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Direct motion.div children. Mix of span-8 hero feature, span-4 squares.
landing_page.pricing: 3-tier glass cards. Use the 'Tracing Beam' or subtle neon border-glow on the Pro/Enterprise tier.
landing_page.testimonials: Horizontal scroll / marquee with 'Editorial Ribbon' slow scroll speed. Low contrast cards.
landing_page.footer: Massive py-32 spacing. Darkest background (#030305). Huge 10vw VORTEX text at the bottom.

dashboard.structure: Control Room Grid. Strict grid-cols-12 layout. Dense gap-4 or gap-6. Sidebar is #0A0A12, Main content area is #030305.
dashboard.tools_grid: Compact widgets, 1px border border-white/5, hover -translate-y-1, subtle glow. Use Phosphor Icons.
dashboard.chat_ui: Narrow central chat feed (max-w-3xl) to ensure readability. Deep tinted user bubbles (#0A1128), transparent AI bubbles with 1px border-white/10.
dashboard.code_generator: Dark terminal aesthetic for output window. Use JetBrains Mono for code.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00F0FF] text-black font-semibold hover:bg-[#E0FFFF] transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-[#12121D] border border-white/10 rounded-lg text-white focus:border-[#00F0FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00F0FF] transition-all placeholder:text-slate-600 h-12 px-4

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL PACKAGES: yarn add framer-motion @phosphor-icons/react react-fast-marquee clsx tailwind-merge

CUSTOMIZE SHADCN: By default Shadcn uses white/light-mode variables. Override the globals.css with the exact colors provided in this JSON: --background: #030305, --foreground: #FFFFFF, --card: #0A0A12, --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.05), --primary: #00F0FF.
Do NOT use raw HTML <select> or native date pickers. Use customized Shadcn dropdowns and calendar components.
Use Outfit for Headings, JetBrains Mono for overlines/metrics/code, Manrope for body text. Add these to Tailwind config.
Ensure glassmorphism overlays do not ruin contrast. Provide text-shadows if text overlaps complex image elements.
Implement 'data-testid' across all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, navigation, dialogs).
Dashboard cards should avoid flat default appearance - use subtle 1px border-white/5 and dark background #0A0A12.
Never use dummyimage.com or via.placeholder.com. Use the exact URLs provided in the media section of this JSON.
For Code Output components, ensure proper terminal styling (dark background, monospaced font, colored syntax mimicking VS Code dark theme).
Landing page hero must use the provided vortex image URL as background with a dark overlay, and feature the brand logo prominently.
Admin Panel and Dashboard Analytics should use Recharts or Shadcn Charts with Electric Blue and Deep Purple strokes.
